svg.title: EISP AWS VPC Infrastructure Diagram
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing EISP AWS VPC with Internet Gateway, four subnets, route tables, security groups, and traffic flow paths

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the internet gateway and why does EISP need it?')
sendPrompt('How does the Internet Gateway work in the EISP VPC?')

svg.text: Route tables control traffic paths inside the VPC

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the EISP-RT-Public route table do?')
sendPrompt('What does the EISP-RT-Private route table do?')
sendPrompt('What does the EISP-RT-Isolated route table do?')
sendPrompt('What is the EISP public subnet used for?')
sendPrompt('What is the jump host bastion server in EISP?')
g.text: Entry point for all admin access

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the inbound rules for EISP-SG-JumpHost?')
g.text: In: port 22 from My IP · port 443

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the Kali Linux subnet completely isolated?')
sendPrompt('What does Kali Linux do in the EISP lab?')
sendPrompt('What are the inbound rules for EISP-SG-KaliLab?')
g.text: In: port 22 from JumpHost SG only

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the Vault server in a private subnet?')
sendPrompt('How does HashiCorp Vault work in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What are the inbound rules for EISP-SG-Vault?')
sendPrompt('What does Wazuh SIEM do in EISP?')
sendPrompt('How is Wazuh deployed in EISP?')
sendPrompt('What are the inbound rules for EISP-SG-SIEM?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS CloudTrail logging work in EISP?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS IAM integrate with the EISP VPC?')
